# Warranty Coverage

Every item ships with a one-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in
materials and workmanship. The warranty does not cover damage from misuse,
unauthorized repairs, or normal wear and tear. A valid proof of purchase is
required to file a warranty claim.

[Source: warranty.md#coverage-period]
